source: DealOrNoDeal (Lewis et al. 2017, MIT license, via stanfordnlp/cocoa)

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: would you take the three balls and i get the hats and book ?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: absolutely not . i'm taking that book , you can have the rest if you'd like .

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: the balls are worthless to me , i need the book

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: the hats are worthless to me . that book is the only thing i can profit on .

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: im willing to give you the two hats and the three balls for that book .

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: look at it this way . either you give me the book and you get a good deal on the next hit and keep earning at a good pace , or we stonewall and you make . 15 cents for the next 15 minutes .

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: sorry the instructions say no talk about things other than the deal . so ill restate the offer . you get the two and hats and three balls . i get the book

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: we will keep talking about the deal . you will just make absolutely nothing after all is said and done . either you give me the book , or we both walk away with nothing . i'll be fine if we walk away with nothing , you won't .

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: since you are so kind , i will give you the book for everything else .
